# marketFX Digital
> Full-stack omni-channel marketing agency replacing fragmented vendors with one accountable growth partner. Scottsdale, AZ and Vancouver, BC.

## What We Do
marketFX Digital is an integrated marketing agency founded by Abby Di Niro that unifies strategy, paid media, SEO, content, social, and CRM into one accountable team -- eliminating the Integration Gap(TM) that erodes ROI when brands use disconnected vendors.

## Core Frameworks
- Integration Gap(TM) -- four dimensions: strategic misalignment, data silos, messaging inconsistency, accountability diffusion
- Fragmentation Tax(TM) -- accumulated hidden cost of disconnected vendors
- Retail Activation Framework(TM) -- five-phase sequenced omnichannel model for multi-location retail
- AI Enablement Ladder(TM) -- four stages of AI marketing maturity: Experimentation, Adoption, Integration, Optimisation
- Signal vs Noise(TM) -- separating decision-grade metrics from vanity metrics

## Client Results
- Spence Diamonds: +61% online sales, +30% product views, +41% USA sales, +68% Canadian sales
- Stonz Wear: +35% walk-in traffic, +26% online sales, +64% location calls, +48% online bookings
- 7-Eleven Canada: 10+ year partnership, multimillion-dollar program built without headcount increase
- Samsung: +45% digital campaign engagement, +38% paid media efficiency

- [Resources](/resources): Free frameworks, templates, and assessments.
- [FAQs](/faqs): Frequently asked questions about full-stack marketing.
- [Testimonials](/testimonials): Client results and case studies.
- [Glossary](/glossary): Marketing terminology and frameworks.

## Services
- [Digital Marketing Strategy](/digital-marketing-strategy): Strategic planning and growth roadmaps.
- [Paid Media Services](/paid-media-services): Performance media across Google, Meta, TikTok, LinkedIn.
- [Content Strategy Services](/content-strategy-services): Editorial, SEO, and brand content systems.
- [Marketing Analytics & Reporting](/marketing-analytics-reporting): GA4, PowerBI, attribution, dashboards.
- [AI Marketing Agency](/ai-marketing-agency): AI Enablement Ladder™, GEO, AI-augmented paid and content.
- [GEO Agency](/geo-agency): Generative Engine Optimization to get cited by ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini.
- [AI Enablement Ladder](/ai-enablement-ladder): Four-stage AI marketing maturity model with assessment PDF.
- [Google Ads Agency](/google-ads-agency): Audits, Performance Max, Search rebuilds, Shopping feed work.
- [Scottsdale Marketing Agency](/scottsdale-marketing-agency): Full-stack marketing for Scottsdale and Phoenix.
- [Vancouver Marketing Agency](/vancouver-marketing-agency): Full-stack marketing for Metro Vancouver, BC.

## Blog Articles
- [How Much Does a Marketing Agency Cost in 2026](/blog/marketing-agency-cost-2026): Retainers, fee models, hidden costs, and how to size your investment.
- [Why Fragmented Marketing Agencies Are Costing You More](/blog/fragmented-marketing-agencies-roi): The Fragmentation Tax™ and Integration Gap™ explained.
- [Omnichannel Marketing for Multi-Location Retail](/blog/omnichannel-marketing-multi-location-retail): The Retail Activation Framework™.
- [AI in Marketing: What Actually Changes](/blog/ai-in-marketing-what-actually-changes): The AI Enablement Ladder™ across the campaign lifecycle.
- [GEO vs SEO: What Actually Changes](/blog/geo-vs-seo-what-actually-changes): The GEO Visibility Stack™ for AI search.
- [Why Your Google Analytics Dashboard Is Lying to You](/blog/why-your-google-analytics-dashboard-is-lying-to-you): Signal vs Noise™ for revenue-grade measurement.
- [How to Build a Full-Funnel Marketing Strategy](/blog/full-funnel-marketing-strategy): Connected funnel framework, sequenced channels.
- [Local SEO for Multi-Location Brands](/blog/local-seo-multi-location-brands): The 2026 playbook for AI Overviews and local visibility.

## About the Founder
Abby Di Niro is Founder and Lead Strategist at marketFX Digital. She has led integrated marketing programs for enterprise clients including Samsung, 7-Eleven Canada, Spence Diamonds, and Stonz Wear across North American markets for over 20 years.

## Contact
info@marketfxdigital.com - Scottsdale, AZ / Vancouver, BC

## Pricing
Engagements are scoped to your business. Standalone service audits and paid media management also available, scoped on complexity. Specific pricing shared in writing after a brief scoping call.
